required_skills: Manufacturing Operations and Production Process Execution
Quality Control and Quality Assurance Procedures
Workplace Safety and Environmental Health Compliance
preferred_skills: Root Cause Analysis and Corrective Actions
responsibilities: Operate manufacturing equipment according to standard operating procedures while maintaining productivity, quality standards, and workplace safety requirements.
Monitor production processes and equipment performance to ensure consistent output quality and compliance with manufacturing specifications.
Conduct routine quality inspections and document production results to support traceability and regulatory compliance requirements.
Collaborate with engineering, maintenance, and quality teams to resolve production issues and minimize manufacturing downtime.
Implement continuous improvement recommendations that enhance process efficiency, reduce waste, and improve operational performance.
Maintain accurate production records, batch documentation, and operational logs within manufacturing execution and ERP systems.
Support material handling and inventory movement activities to ensure uninterrupted production schedules and workflow continuity.
Follow GMP requirements, safety protocols, and operational guidelines to maintain compliance within manufacturing environments.
